summary: Committed and pushed the direct MCP status parity output fix and regression at app commit cbbd360. Verified current live Codex pre-response, two-client direct MCP parity, zero task lifecycle blockers, and a current qualifying 50k scale report. Release remains intentionally blocked on clean-machine recovery, 24-hour soak, real encrypted restore, and final certification.
decisions: Keep release blocked until clean-machine recovery and soak predicates pass.
Expose parity and agent proof summaries in machine-readable CLI output.
Publish only exact task-scoped OS artifacts and leave unrelated data backlog untouched.
next_steps: Run DIST-02 on a clean Windows profile with both clients and a real encrypted restore.
Build and publish immutable release assets, then run the final completion audit.
